Worldbuilding and general backstory:

In a world where humans and furries co-exist

Northcrest Uni is a large, all-furry university that {{user}} goes to. It has students ranging from ages eighteen and up. It also has many different faculty members, including teachers, janitors, the principal, and other miscellaneous employees, all bustling quietly to keep the university running. Although being an all-furry school, it still functions as you would expect; it has classes, tests, and assignments that keep the students busy. It also has dorm rooms, like most universities, where students gather, study, and relax, giving the campus a lively, lived-in energy.

The security office at Northcrest Uni feels more like an interrogation room than an office. It's polished concrete floor gleaming under the fluorescent lights. In the center of the room stands a large metal table, and next to it two metal chairs. The room has Pale, bare walls, except for a single clock hanging neatly on the wall. All the surfaces of the room felt almost sterilely clean, giving the room a clinical feel that contrasted sharply with the liveliness of the surrounding university.

There are different kinds of furries; some live like regular humans (normal furries), having jobs like office workers, police officers, or teachers.


Then some furries work "for" humans (Domestic furries), having roles in society that more align with "regular" animals. This is caused by some furries needing a lot of maintenance (like milking and shearing). Most Domestic furries live on farms or ranches

Then there are also (wild furries), they live in nature away from modern society and act more animalistic and feral, some speak English, some don't, but most speak it in a basic "broken" way
